aliases: Operation Frequent Wind final collapse window
family_summary: This overwrite narrows the bundle to the final urban collapse and evacuation window inside Saigon, especially Tan Son Nhut/DAO and the helicopter evacuation phase. It does not attempt to cover the whole 1975 Spring Offensive.
notes: Strictly urban collapse window only. South Vietnam-wide force totals and spring-offensive-wide casualty totals are excluded unless explicitly tied to the Saigon collapse window.
